title: Payroll Schedule and Accessing Pay Stubs
text:
Q: What is the payroll schedule and how can I access my pay stubs?
A: Our payroll is processed bi-weekly, with paydays occurring every other Friday. Employees can expect their paychecks to be available by 5 PM on payday. To access your pay stubs, please log into the employee portal using your company credentials. Once logged in, navigate to the 'Payroll' section and select 'Pay Stubs' to view and download your pay statements. Pay stubs are typically available for viewing within 24 hours after the payroll is processed. If you encounter any issues accessing your pay stubs or have questions regarding your payroll, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234 for assistance. Remember to check your spam folder if you do not receive email notifications regarding your pay stub availability.
